title: ReviewCacheManifest
description: Manifest for an on-disk vendor-findings checkpoint. Written by both convergence_loop.py:converge() (in-process) and review_dispatcher.py CLI; read by consensus_synthesizer.py CLI as the fallback synthesis input.

schema_version.description: Layout version. Readers MUST refuse unknown versions.

change_id.description: OpenSpec change-id this checkpoint belongs to.

review_type.description: Which review phase produced these findings.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the manifest was written.

vendors.description: One entry per vendor that produced findings. MAY be empty for empty review rounds.

findings_path.description: Relative filename under .review-cache/ for this vendor's findings.

finding_count.description: Number of findings in the per-vendor file. Used for sanity checks.
